title: SK Style Metal Garden Wind Spinner, Balance Stake - Robin Bird Nest
features: Metal garden wind spinner - Robin bird nest
Freestanding garden stake and balance arm sculpture which rotates and rocks in the wind
Constructed by hand from metal, powder coated for weather protection and handpainted in bright and colourful oil paints
Wonderful design to add movement to the garden and a perfect gift all year round. Individually boxed with stake in two pieces which easily slots together
Measures approximately 124cm high x 62cm wide x 18cm deep
